name: EZPAWN
description_short: EZPAWN is a pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, retail merchandise sales, gold buying, and firearms services at their Las Vegas location on E. Charleston Boulevard.
description_long:
EZPAWN operates as a traditional pawn shop with a physical location at 1501 East Charleston Boulevard in Las Vegas, Nevada. The company functions as a collateral-based lending service where customers can pawn items of value to receive immediate cash loans. Beyond lending, EZPAWN maintains a retail operation selling pre-owned brand-name merchandise at significant discounts.

The company offers multiple financial and retail services including pawn loans, gold and diamond jewelry buying, firearm loans and sales, an online shop, layaway options, and flexible payment plans through third-party financing partners. Their EZ+ Rewards Program allows customers to manage transactions online, earn points on eligible purchases and pawns, and make online payments on extensions and layaways (with geographic restrictions). They also provide an Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation and protection plans for purchased items.

EZPAW distinguishes itself through specialized services including firearms evaluation and secure on-site storage, expert precious metals testing and appraisal, and daily inventory rotation of pre-owned merchandise. The company emphasizes community presence and customer service, positioning itself as a convenient alternative to traditional lending. Their product protection plans and jewelry VIP program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits add value beyond basic pawn transactions.

As a pawn shop, EZPAWN provides immediate liquidity without credit checks or traditional underwriting, making it accessible to consumers with poor or no credit history. However, pawn loans come with inherent limitations: items must be surrendered as collateral and redemption requires paying back the loan plus interest and fees. The lack of credit reporting to bureaus means transactions don't help build credit history, and the online payment restriction in certain states limits accessibility for some customers.
address: 6380 N Decatur Blvd Ste 255, North Las Vegas, NV 89084

company_info.headquarters: 6380 N Decatur Blvd Ste 255, North Las Vegas, NV 89084

pros: No credit check required—immediate cash based on item value rather than creditworthiness
Instant Quote tool provides online valuation for electronics before visiting the store
EZ+ Rewards Program offers points on pawns, sales, and purchases with online management capability
Expert precious metals testing and appraisal for gold and diamond jewelry to ensure fair pricing
Flexible redemption: customers can extend pawns or buy back items on their timeline without fixed terms
Wide merchandise selection with daily inventory rotation of brand-name items at 25-70% discounts
Secure on-site firearms storage facility for safely storing pawned firearms
cons: Pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus, so they cannot help build credit history
Online payment functionality unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania, limiting accessibility
Redemption of pawned firearms requires background checks, adding complexity to the process
High effective interest rates inherent to pawn loans when annualized (typical industry rates 60-240% APR)
Loss of collateral if loan and fees cannot be repaid within the grace period
best_for: Consumers who need immediate cash and own valuable items but lack traditional credit
Individuals seeking to buy discounted pre-owned electronics, jewelry, or tools without financing
Firearm owners needing short-term loans while keeping guns in secure storage
Customers looking for flexible short-term liquidity without credit inquiries or fixed repayment schedules
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best for consumers who own valuable items and need immediate cash without a credit check, or bargain shoppers seeking discounted pre-owned merchandise. The main caveat is that pawn loans do not build credit, carry high effective interest rates, and require redemption within specified periods or loss of collateral—making this suitable for short-term liquidity needs rather than credit-building financial solutions.
services: Pawn loans on items in working condition
Gold and diamond jewelry buying and appraisal
Firearm loans with secure on-site storage
Retail sale of pre-owned brand-name merchandise
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Instant Quote tool for electronics valuation
Layaway with 10% down and monthly payments
Take Today flexible payment plans (up to 12 months)
EZ+ Rewards Program with online payment and point management
Product Protection Plans for electronics and merchandise
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and trade-up benefits
